category_title: Students with cognitive and communication delays who learn through observation and non-verbal engagement
minimal_context: Joy is in the science area holding a container of live caterpillars alongside her classmate Audrey.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Audrey is holding the container of caterpillars. Here is the container for you to hold, Joy.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Positions herself closely to listen to the conversation, then takes the container after watching Audrey hold it.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you see in the cup?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Carefully observes the caterpillars, pointing and making utterances to indicate her excitement.)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Screams as the caterpillars suddenly move, making gestures to indicate that she is worried they will crawl up her arm.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Audrey is holding the container of caterpillars. Here is the container for you to hold, Joy.

STUDENT: (Positions herself closely to listen to the conversation, then takes the container after watching Audrey hold it.)

TUTOR: What do you see in the cup?

STUDENT: (Carefully observes the caterpillars, pointing and making utterances to indicate her excitement.)

TUTOR: Look, they are moving around.

STUDENT: (Screams as the caterpillars suddenly move, making gestures to indicate that she is worried they will crawl up her arm.)

task.content: Holding a container of live caterpillars while interacting with a peer (Audrey)

context.materials: Live caterpillars kept in a cup inside a mesh cage, reference books with illustrations and photos of caterpillars and ants, leaves, sticks, flowers, and paper
context.social_setting: Interacting with a peer (Audrey) and a researcher, with enthusiastic conversations occurring among other children

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Screamed and indicated through gestures that she was worried they would crawl up her arm
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Frightened and somewhat afraid of them

behavior_patterns.condition: General social interaction and play in the classroom
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Played alongside other children but rarely engaged in interactive play with them; positioned herself closely and listened intently to the enthusiastic conversations
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Left on the periphery of the classroom social network due to cognitive and communication delays
